name: @hyperprior/pi-web
description: Web helpers for search and fetch
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-web

Simple search and fetch tooling (`hyperpi_web`).

## Installation\n
```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-web
```

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
